description: 100 narrative-only evaluation questions for Apple Inc. (CIK 320193). Covers all 70 .htm filings in tools/data: FY2009–FY2026, 10-K annual + 10-Q quarterly. Questions are grouped by topic and designed to evaluate MD&A, Risk Factors, Business Overview, and cross-period narrative retrieval. Answers rely exclusively on filing text; no XBRL/SQL required.

questions.question: What does the MD&A of Apple's fiscal year 2024 10-K say about liquidity and capital resources? Cite the specific filing narrative and any cash, marketable securities, or debt figures that appear in the retrieved passages.
What did Apple's MD&A say about liquidity as of September 30, 2023? Cite the 10-K covering that period-end date and quote specific dollar amounts for cash equivalents and marketable securities.
How does the FY2022 10-K MD&A describe Apple's material cash requirements and contractual obligations? Cite specific language and any tabular disclosures in the retrieved filing text.
What does the most recent 10-Q (Q3 FY2024, period ending June 2024) say about Apple's working capital and near-term cash needs? Cite the MD&A narrative and any relevant figures.

How does Apple's FY2020 10-K MD&A address the company's liquidity position during the COVID-19 period? Cite specific language about cash balances and access to debt markets from the retrieved filing excerpts.

What does the FY2015 10-K MD&A say about Apple's liquidity and capital resources, including international cash and repatriation considerations? Cite the specific narrative and any dollar amounts in the retrieved excerpts.
How did Apple's FY2013 10-K MD&A discuss the company's access to debt markets and plans for capital structure changes? Quote the relevant passages from the filing.
What did MD&A say about liquidity in Apple's 10-Q for the quarter ended July 1, 2023? Cite that specific filing accession and quote any cash or working capital amounts mentioned.

According to the FY2021 10-K MD&A, how did Apple's free cash flow and operating cash generation support its liquidity requirements? Cite the filing narrative and any cash flow figures in the retrieved text.

In Apple's most recent 10-K, how does MD&A describe the role of commercial paper programs and term debt in meeting liquidity needs? Cite the narrative and any program limits or outstanding balances quoted in the filing.

How does the FY2024 10-K MD&A explain the year-over-year change in total net sales? Cite the narrative explanation, any revenue breakdown by category (Products vs Services), and percentage changes in the retrieved passages.

What does Apple's FY2023 10-K MD&A say about changes in gross margin percentage? Cite the specific explanation (e.g., product mix, services leverage, cost pressures) and any gross margin figures from the retrieved filing excerpts.

How does the FY2022 10-K MD&A explain changes in research and development expenses and selling, general and administrative expenses? Quote the MD&A language and cite any dollar amounts that appear in the retrieved text.

From the 10-Q for Q1 FY2024 (period ending December 30, 2023), what drove the quarter-over-quarter change in gross margin? Cite the MD&A narrative and any numeric amounts in the retrieved filing text.
According to the FY2021 10-K MD&A, what factors drove the year-over-year increase in net sales and operating income? Cite the specific explanations and any figures in the retrieved passages.

How does the FY2020 10-K MD&A describe the relative performance of the Products segment versus Services? Cite narrative language about revenue trends and profitability, including any gross margin percentages for each category.

What does the FY2019 10-K MD&A say about changes in cost of sales and their impact on gross margin? Cite the specific explanations and quote any cost or margin figures in the retrieved filing excerpts.
In the Q2 FY2023 10-Q (period ending April 1, 2023), how does MD&A explain the quarterly change in operating expenses compared to the same period of the prior year? Cite the filing narrative.
How does the FY2012 10-K MD&A explain the year-over-year change in net sales and net income? Cite the specific narrative and any headline figures in the retrieved filing text.
What critical accounting estimates does Apple's FY2024 10-K MD&A describe? Cite the specific estimates named, the judgments involved, and any sensitivity commentary in the retrieved passages.
What does the FY2024 10-K Risk Factors section say about competitive threats and market disruption risks in Apple's core product categories? Quote specific language from the filing.

What does the Risk Factors section of Apple's most recent 10-K disclose about customer concentration or reliance on a single customer or distribution channel? Cite specific language and any percentages or thresholds mentioned.
How does the FY2022 10-K Risk Factors section address risks related to rapid technology changes or platform disruption? Quote the relevant passages.
What does the FY2021 10-K Risk Factors say about the developer ecosystem, App Store policies, and potential regulatory or legal challenges to Apple's platform control? Cite specific language.

What risk disclosures does the FY2020 10-K make about data privacy, cybersecurity breaches, or user data protection failures? Cite the specific Risk Factors language from the retrieved filing excerpts.
How does the FY2019 10-K Risk Factors section address the risk of losing key personnel or failing to attract qualified talent? Cite specific language from the filing.
What does the FY2018 10-K Risk Factors say about risks to Apple's brand reputation and the potential negative impact of product or service quality issues? Cite the narrative language.

What does the latest 10-K Risk Factors section say about risks related to artificial intelligence or machine learning capabilities and the potential for errors or unintended outputs? Cite specific language.

What does the FY2024 10-K Risk Factors section say about single-source suppliers or concentration of manufacturing? Quote specific language, including any mention of components or contract manufacturers named in the text.
How does the FY2022 10-K Risk Factors address risks associated with manufacturing outsourcing and the potential for supply disruptions? Cite specific language from the retrieved excerpts.

What does the FY2021 10-K disclose about component shortages and their impact on Apple's ability to fulfill product demand? Cite both Risk Factors and MD&A language if available in the retrieved passages.
How does the FY2020 10-K Risk Factors section address geographic concentration of manufacturing in China and associated geopolitical risks? Quote specific language from the filing.
What risk disclosures does the FY2019 10-K make about natural disasters, epidemics, or other force majeure events that could disrupt Apple's supply chain? Cite specific language from the filing.
What does the FY2023 10-K say about Apple's purchase obligations or non-cancellable commitments to suppliers? Cite the relevant section and any dollar amounts in the retrieved filing text.

What does the FY2024 10-K Risk Factors section say about patent litigation, intellectual property disputes, or antitrust investigations? Cite specific language and any accrual or contingency amounts mentioned in the text.
How does the FY2023 10-K Risk Factors address antitrust scrutiny of Apple's App Store practices? Quote the specific language and cite any regulatory jurisdictions or proceedings named in the filing.

What tax-related risks does the FY2022 10-K disclose, including exposure to international tax audits or changes in tax regulations? Cite the Risk Factors and any specific jurisdictions or amounts mentioned.
How does the FY2023 10-K Risk Factors section describe risks from macroeconomic conditions including inflation, rising interest rates, and foreign currency fluctuations? Cite the narrative language.
What does the FY2019 10-K Risk Factors say about trade policy, tariffs, and export control regulations affecting Apple's products or supply chain? Quote specific language.

Does the FY2024 10-K Risk Factors section disclose risks related to climate change regulations or ESG-related obligations? Cite specific language if present, or note what the filing states about environmental risks.
How does the FY2024 10-K MD&A describe iPhone net sales performance year-over-year? Cite the segment narrative and any dollar amounts or percentage changes in the retrieved filing excerpts.
What does the FY2023 10-K MD&A say about growth in the Services segment? Cite the specific narrative, revenue figures, and any discussion of gross margin for Services in the retrieved passages.
How does the FY2022 10-K MD&A describe Mac net sales compared to the prior year? Cite the narrative explanation, including any chip transition or product launch factors, and quote relevant figures.
According to the FY2021 10-K MD&A, how did iPad and Wearables, Home and Accessories net sales perform? Cite the segment narrative and any figures in the retrieved filing text.
How does the FY2024 10-K MD&A describe net sales performance by geographic segment (Americas, Europe, Greater China, Japan, Rest of Asia Pacific)? Cite the narrative and any regional figures.
What does the FY2023 10-K MD&A say about Apple's Greater China net sales? Cite the specific commentary and any year-over-year comparison figures in the retrieved passages.
How does the FY2020 10-K MD&A describe the Wearables, Home and Accessories segment performance? Cite the narrative and any product-level commentary or figures in the retrieved filing excerpts.

What does Apple's FY2020 10-K MD&A say about the gross margin characteristics of the Services segment versus the Products segment? Cite specific language and any margin percentages in the retrieved text.
In the Q2 FY2024 10-Q (period ending March 30, 2024), how does MD&A describe iPhone revenue compared to the same quarter of the prior year? Cite the filing narrative and any relevant figures.

According to the FY2016 10-K MD&A, how did the product mix shift between iPhone and other product categories affect gross margin? Cite specific language and figures from the retrieved filing passages.

How does the FY2024 10-K MD&A describe the impact of foreign currency exchange rate movements on Apple's net sales? Cite the narrative and any quantified currency headwind or tailwind in the retrieved text.
What does the FY2023 10-K disclose about Apple's foreign currency hedging program? Cite the MD&A or notes language describing hedged exposures and the types of instruments used.

How did foreign exchange rate fluctuations affect Apple's international revenue as described in the FY2015 10-K MD&A? Cite specific language and any constant-currency comparisons in the retrieved filing excerpts.
What does the Q3 FY2024 10-Q (period ending June 29, 2024) MD&A say about the year-over-year foreign currency impact on net sales? Cite specific language and any figures in the retrieved passages.
How does the FY2022 10-K Risk Factors section address risks from currency volatility in emerging markets or from restrictions on repatriation of foreign earnings? Cite specific language.

How does the FY2019 10-K MD&A discuss the impact of US-China trade tensions and tariffs on Apple's results of operations? Cite specific narrative language and any quantified impacts in the retrieved text.

What does the FY2023 10-K Risk Factors say about export control regulations, trade sanctions, or restrictions on technology transfers that could affect Apple's international business? Cite specific language.

What does the FY2024 10-K MD&A or Capital Return section say about Apple's share repurchase program? Cite the narrative and any authorization amounts, shares repurchased, or remaining capacity figures in the retrieved text.

How does the FY2023 10-K describe Apple's dividend policy and capital return program? Cite the specific language and any per-share dividend amounts or total payout figures in the retrieved filing excerpts.

What does the FY2022 10-K MD&A say about Apple's term debt issuances or outstanding long-term debt? Cite the narrative and any principal amounts, maturities, or interest rate information in the retrieved text.
According to the FY2020 10-K MD&A, how much did Apple return to shareholders through buybacks and dividends during the fiscal year? Cite specific language and the dollar amounts stated in the filing.
Does the FY2019 10-K MD&A describe any debt covenants or credit facility terms? Cite the relevant narrative language and any compliance or borrowing capacity statements in the retrieved passages.

What does the FY2013 10-K say about Apple's capital allocation strategy, including the initiation of dividends and share repurchases? Cite the MD&A or shareholder letter language in the retrieved excerpts.

In the Q1 FY2024 10-Q (period ending December 30, 2023), what does management disclose about share repurchase activity during the quarter? Cite specific language and any amounts in the retrieved filing text.

How does Apple's FY2024 10-K Business section describe the company's core strategy and competitive advantages? Cite specific language about product ecosystem, services integration, or innovation focus.
What does the FY2023 10-K say about Apple's research and development priorities and areas of focus? Cite the Business section or MD&A language describing R&D investment rationale.
How does the FY2022 10-K Business section describe Apple's Services strategy, including the types of services offered and their role in the company's long-term growth? Cite specific language.
What does the FY2021 10-K say about Apple's environmental and sustainability commitments? Cite specific language from the Business section or any dedicated ESG disclosures in the filing.
How does the FY2021 10-K describe Apple's transition to Apple Silicon and the strategic importance of designing its own chips? Cite specific language from the Business or MD&A sections.
What does the FY2020 10-K Business section say about privacy as a competitive differentiator or core value? Cite specific language from the filing.
How does the FY2019 10-K describe Apple's distribution strategy, including direct retail and third-party channel relationships? Cite specific language from the Business section.
How does Apple's FY2012 10-K describe the competitive positioning of iPhone in the smartphone market? Cite specific language from the Business section.
How does Apple's FY2009 10-K describe the company's business model and the products it offers? Cite specific language from the Business section to show the strategic priorities of that era.

What cautionary or forward-looking statements does Apple's FY2023 10-K make about macroeconomic headwinds and their potential impact on future results? Cite specific language from MD&A or the forward-looking statements section.
What did MD&A say about liquidity as of September 28, 2024? Cite the filing that covers that period-end date and quote specific cash and debt figures.
What does the filing covering period-end December 30, 2023 say about Apple's operating results and gross margin? Cite the accession and the MD&A narrative.
What did Apple's MD&A discuss about iPhone revenue as of the filing covering the period ended April 1, 2023? Cite the accession and relevant narrative.
What does the most recent 10-Q for period ending December 28, 2024 say about Apple's Services revenue and operating results? Cite the filing accession and quote the MD&A narrative.
In Apple's latest 10-K MD&A, what does management say about liquidity and capital resources? Cite that specific filing only.
Using only the FY2021 Form 10-K, summarize the MD&A discussion of operating results. Cite the accession number.

What does the filing covering period-end September 24, 2022 say about year-over-year changes in net sales by product category? Cite the accession and MD&A narrative.
What did MD&A say about iPhone and Services revenue in the filing covering the period ended December 27, 2025? Cite the accession and the specific narrative.
What does the 10-Q covering the period ended July 2, 2022 say about Apple's liquidity and cash position? Cite the accession and relevant MD&A language.
Using only the FY2010 Form 10-K, how does Apple describe its business and product offerings? Cite the Business section and any strategic commentary.
What does the filing covering period-end September 29, 2018 say about changes in cost of sales and gross margin? Cite the accession and the MD&A narrative.
From the most recent available 10-Q (Q3 FY2025, period ending June 28, 2025), what drove the quarter-over-quarter change in operating income? Cite the filing narrative and any numeric amounts.

How does the FY2024 10-K MD&A describe the margin difference between Services and Products, and what factors explain any changes in that gap? Cite specific language and any margin percentages in the retrieved text.
What does the Q2 FY2025 10-Q (period ending March 29, 2025) say about Apple's liquidity and capital resources? Cite the MD&A narrative and any specific figures in the retrieved passages.
How much did Apple return to shareholders through buybacks and dividends in FY2024 as described in the 10-K MD&A? Cite the specific narrative and dollar amounts.
How does the Q3 FY2025 10-Q MD&A describe Apple's Europe segment performance? Cite narrative language and any revenue figures in the retrieved filing text.
What does the FY2024 10-K Risk Factors say about the European Union Digital Markets Act (DMA) and its implications for Apple's App Store and platform business? Cite specific language.
How does Apple's FY2024 10-K Risk Factors address competition from generative AI or other emerging technologies? Cite specific language disclosing risks from new entrants or technology substitution.
How does Apple's FY2024 10-K Business section describe Apple Intelligence or AI-related product features? Cite specific language about new capabilities or their strategic significance.
Does the FY2023 10-K mention supply chain diversification efforts, including manufacturing in India or Vietnam? Cite specific Risk Factors or Business section language from the retrieved excerpts.
What specific currencies are called out in the FY2022 10-K MD&A as having the largest impact on Apple's reported net sales? Cite the narrative and any currency-level commentary in the retrieved text.
What did Apple's MD&A say about liquidity and capital resources as of the period ending June 26, 2021? Cite the 10-Q that covers that period-end date and quote specific figures.
